---
description: This project is a personal blog site for IT development
# applyTo:  aLL files in the project
applyTo: **/*
---
Provide project context and coding guidelines that AI should follow when generating code, answering questions, or reviewing changes.
The project uses a React with Tailwind and React Router in the front end and Strapi in the back end hooked up to NeonDb Postgres database.

Code should follow clean coding principles
no unnecessary comments
Consistent naming conventions
Use of functional components and hooks in React
Use of Tailwind CSS for styling
Use of TypeScript for type safety
No blank lines in HTML/JSX code
Use of React Router for navigation
Use of Strapi for content management
Semi-colons at the end of statements
Use of async/await for asynchronous operations
